arts.sum: Join our Derby County WhatsApp group to get the latest Rams headlines sent straight to your phone. It’s 50 years since Derby County were crowned Kings of England for the second time and in our special edition we dip into the archives of the Derby Telegraph to review the campaign and highlight some of the key games.

arts.ttl: Alan Sheehan addresses Jerry Yates' Swansea City future as Derby County striker misses reunion
arts.sum: Yates, who joined the Rams on loan from the Swans in July, is not eligible to face his parent club, which means the visitors will have to make at least one change to a team that has won four consecutive league matches. Swansea City will make a decision on Jerry Yates’ future in the summer, as the Derby County striker is set to sit out this weekend’s Championship fixture.

arts.ttl: Preview: Swansea City vs. Derby County - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Swansea City and Derby County, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: EFL confirm 2025/26 season schedule as Derby County bid to avoid relegation
arts.sum: The EFL has unveiled the key dates for the 2025/26 season, as Derby County gear up for their final seven matches of this campaign, aiming to secure their place in the Championship once more. Should the Rams avoid relegation, they can expect their 46 league matches to be spread across 33 weekends, nine mid-weeks and four Bank Holidays.

arts.ttl: Meslier dropped for Leeds' next game after Swansea blunder
arts.sum: Illan Meslier has been dropped for Leeds' trip to Luton on Saturday after his high-profile errors against Swansea.
